resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign up
Already have an account? Sign in

GuardSMS Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2025

1. DATA WE COLLECT

Message Content: Incoming SMS messages are stored temporarily on our servers (Supabase) for up to 24 hours to perform threat analysis. After 24 hours, message content is automatically and permanently deleted.

Contacts: Your phone contacts (name and phone number) are synced to our servers in plaintext to enable the "not in your contacts" detection feature. Contact data is stored permanently unless you delete your account.

URLs, Domains, and Links: Extracted from messages and stored as SHA-256 cryptographic hashes only. The original URL or domain cannot be reconstructed from the hash.

2. HOW WE USE YOUR DATA

All data is used solely to detect phishing, fraud, malware, and other SMS-based threats. Flagged domains and hashed URLs are shared across the community to improve collective protection. We do not sell or share personal data with third parties.

3. DATA STORAGE

All data is stored in Supabase (cloud database). Message content is deleted after 24 hours. Contact data persists until account deletion. Hashed URLs and domains persist to power the community threat database.

4. YOUR RIGHTS

You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us. Deleting your account removes all messages, contacts, and personal reports.

5. PERMISSIONS

SMS Permission: Required to receive and analyze incoming messages.
Contacts Permission: Required to identify whether a sender is in your address book.
Internet Permission: Required to sync data with our servers.

6. CONTACT

For privacy concerns or data deletion requests, contact: privacy@guardsms.app
